raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to delete recursively with confirmation auto-yes. Use find and rm -f. But to answer y to any prompt, use rm -f no prompts. But if using -i? They want answer y. Use find ... -delete? That doesn't prompt. But requirement: answer y to any prompt. Could use yes | rm -i? But better: find /system -type f -name '*.txt' -exec rm -f {} +. Provide command.
